Package jline.lang.nodes

Class Station

java.lang.Object
jline.lang.Element
jline.lang.NetworkElement
jline.lang.nodes.Node
jline.lang.nodes.StatefulNode
jline.lang.nodes.Station
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Join, Place, Queue, Source
public class Station extends StatefulNode implements Serializable
A node where jobs can spend time stationing there
See Also:
